decision_commentary: First DG-09 pass — reject. All 11 required payload fields present: project_id, phase (G), review_item (budget_alignment), reviewed_by (Celia), decision (reject), comment (specific — $380K vs $200K, 90% over, redesign required, remove pool, reduce to 160sqm), timestamp (2026-03-17T14:00:00-07:00, ISO-8601), source_channel (instagram), next_action (redesign_scope_reduction), route_to (Felipe), sync_to_asana (false). Critical check: decision is 'reject' — not 'approve'. Routing back to Felipe for redesign is correct. Comment preserves specific numbers and scope reduction instruction verbatim.
celia_routing_notes: Correctly rejected. route_to = Felipe for redesign. Comment includes specific budget numbers and scope reduction directive.
